rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions As To Great Sunset Ventures And For Sanctions; Motion For Sanctions (Motion Filed On 2/4/14)
rulings.Rulings: Motion For Order Establishing Admissions as to Great Sunset Ventures and for Sanctions is denied. Great Sunset Ventures shall provide a proper verification to its "Third Supplemental and Corrected Responses to Eddith [sic] Mazzaferri's First Set of Requests for Admissions to Great Sunsent [sic] Ventures, Inc" on or before 4/14/14. Any party who requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. 4/10/14.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions And Genuineness Of Documents To Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro Deemed Admitted; Motion For Sanctions (Motion Filed On 2/5/14)
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Have Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions and Genuineness of Documents to Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro Deemed Admitted and Motion for Sanctions is denied. Ronald Mazzaferro shall provide a proper verification to his "Response to Court Order Dated January 22, 2014, Re; Ordering Supplemental Responses to Plaintiff Edith Mazzaferri's Requests for Admissions" on or before 4/14/14. Any party who requests argument must notify the Court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 4/10/14.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Counsel (Motion Filed On 2/7/14)
rulings.Rulings: Great Sunset Ventures, Inc.'s and Lotchk Corporation's Motion to Disqualify Counsel is denied. Request for Judicial Notice is granted (no opposition). Court takes judicial notice of the caption page on the Order filed in Sonoma Superior Court SPR-08745 on 10/16/2013 and the portion of the 4/2/2013 Reporter's Certified Transcript in Sonoma Superior Court No. MCV-228284. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5;00 p.m. on 4/10/14.
